name: multi-analyst-desk
description: Multi-analyst AI team that detects ETF mispricing using game theory. 4 specialists (macro, sector, quant, event) + chief strategist produce pre-market, intraday, and post-market reports with credit spread recommendations. Unique features: Nash equilibrium pricing model, bilingual news intelligence (EN + Chinese sources), built-in critical thinking (Devil's Advocate, contradiction detection), and disagreement-driven synthesis instead of consensus averaging.

examples.title: Run pre-market analysis
examples.description: 4-analyst team produces GTMVF mispricing table, hypothesis probability updates, and credit spread recommendations with Kelly sizing

examples.title: Find mispriced ETFs
examples.prompt: What ETFs are mispriced right now?
examples.description: GTMVF engine calculates Nash equilibrium prices across the ETF universe and identifies tradeable gaps

examples.title: Post-market review
examples.description: End-of-day P&L review, overnight risk assessment, and next-day action plan with chief strategist postmortem
